cn.description:
The application contains a variety of articles and tips for anyone who works with computer technology or is simply interested in it.

It is divided into three sections:

1. Hardware
2. PC assembly
3. Software

The Hardware section contains information about all computer components, peripherals, and other equipment. The basic theory of computer parts is explained in simple language. Here you will find articles about% the motherboard, central processor, RAM, graphics card, and other hardware.

Hardware topics include:
• Motherboard, central processing unit, random access memory, power supply unit, graphics card, optical disk drive, sound card, cooling systems, computer cases
• Hard disk drives (HDD), solid-state drives (SSD), optical disks, USB flash drives
• Keyboards, mice, webcams, microphones, image scanners
• Monitors, speakers, headphones, printers, projectors
• Network interface controllers, routers, mobile broadband modems
• Gaming devices, uninterruptible power supplies, peripheral connectors

The PC assembly section offers step-by-step guides and illustrated instructions on how to build your own computer or replace its components. Detailed diagrams and pictures will help you understand how to assemble a PC, install or upgrade equipment, and fit components.

PC assembly topics include:
• Motherboard installation
• CPU installation
• Applying and replacing thermal paste
• Installing a graphics card, RAM modules, power supply, air cooling system, sound card, SSD, or HDD

The Software section provides information about computer operating systems and the basic programs that most PC users work with.

Software topics include:
• Operating systems
• Essential programs

This application is ideal for anyone who wants to improve or refresh their knowledge of computer technology.

After completing the course, you will be able to assemble your own computer or upgrade it confidently.

The app contains more than 50 articles and includes a search function for terms and definitions. We regularly update the course on computer fundamentals. You can also report errors or suggest improvements.

cn.description:
All in one app for an Interactive Map, Loot locations, Material list and breakdown list, Enemy drop list, guides and quest-line guides.

- Interactive Maps
- Sort and Filter
- Event Timers and Notifications
- Guides for Quests

Guides and Maps are partially available for free, but a Pro membership is required to access all content

Raiders Map is the best tool for easy access to everything, along with world class support. You can reach me directly on X for help or to report any issues: All4nDev, or through discord.


Not affiliated with embark. Raiders Map is independently owned and managed.

hk.releaseNotes:
新增熱詞功能。
修復了一下已知bug。
hk.description:
Notteka係一款專為高效會議而生嘅AI會議記錄應用，幫你輕鬆錄音、精準轉寫、智能總結，令會議記錄唔再係負擔。

  核心功能：

  【實時錄音轉寫】                                                                                                    
  一鍵錄音，AI實時將語音轉為文字。支援廣東話、普通話、英文、日文四種語言，滿足多語言會議場景。
                                                                                                                      
  【AI智能摘要】                                                    
  會議結束後，AI自動生成結構化會議摘要。多種摘要模版可揀，快速提煉會議重點、待辦事項同決議內容。                      
                                                                                                                      
  【音視頻文件導入】                           
  支援從本地或其它APP導入音頻、視頻文件，自動完成轉寫，令已有嘅錄音都可以快速變成文字記錄。                           
                                                                                                                      
  【AI對話助手】                               
  針對會議內容進行AI對話，快速獲取關鍵信息，追問細節，令會議內容隨時可查可問。                                        
                                                                                                                      
  【便捷管理】                                 
  - 會議記錄按時間自動分組，一目了然                                                                                  
  - 支援搜索、編輯、分享、複製                                      
  - 文件夾分類管理，井井有條                   
                                                                                                                      
  【多語言界面】
  應用界面支援簡體中文、粵語、英文、日文，適配唔同地區用戶。                                                          
                                                                                                                      
  無論係工作會議、課堂講座、訪談記錄定係靈感備忘，Notteka都係你嘅智能會議拍檔。

聖經(和合本)(繁體中英對照)
	Application contains traditional Chinese bible and English bible for reference reading.
	可自由選擇中英對照, 繁體中文或英文聖經閱讀.


請參考在PalReader 網站上的使用錄像來深入了解此應用程序.
閱讀程序具有以下先進功能:

專為iPhone 而做的存儲優化, 存儲相同的圖書比其它程序節省超過30%的空間.
全屏幕閱讀支持. LoudReader 只在用戶需要時顯示控制對話框, 而其它iPhone 閱讀程序顯示控制始終佔用寶貴的屏幕.
支持任意方向閱讀. 程序自動調整圖書顯示方式.
使用HTML顯示圖書的多種字體與圖像, 優於其它程序的單一字體文本顯示方式.
頁內捲動控制幫助讀者在長頁面內快速移動到任意位置.
直觀調整字體大小,顏色以及背景.
手指雙擊擊即可使用的章節選擇, 字體大小控制.
歷史記憶功能幫助用戶快速到任意章節或前後章節
準確回到上次閱讀位置(甚至包括上次卷滾條位置)

操作簡介

每一章為一長頁, 用手指拖動卷滾或輕擊頁面上部1/4或下部1/4進行向上或向下翻頁.
雙擊頁面即可彈出控制面板. 閱讀器的操作由這一個彈出式控制面板控制, 簡單直觀方便易用.
如希望快速在頁面內移動, 可用控制面板小滾輪選擇頁面位置百分比.
輕擊綠色的箭頭控制章節導航的後退和前進.
退出閱讀器時程序會自動記住最後的閱讀位置(甚至包括上次卷滾條位置), 下次進入閱讀器時程序直接打開到此處.

advisories: 偶爾/輕度的現實生活暴力
hk.description:
與四位英雄一起開始您的旅程：Maximus，Mount，Quinn和Lunae。 選擇你最喜歡的英雄，征服黑暗。 （Maximus可在免費版本上獲得）

全新黑暗幻想史詩
隨時隨地遊玩扣人心弦的口袋尺寸幻想 RPG！突破手遊的極限，亡者暗影是一款離線格鬥遊戲，不需要網路連線。以你想要的方式戰鬥，玩家可以在四位獨特的暗影騎士中選擇，以多種遊戲風格和大量稀有護甲來征服敵對的暗黑世界。揮舞暗黑之劍，結交戰友，擊殺暗影！

玩家的選擇
在四位別具特色的暗影騎士中選擇，每位暗影騎士代表著截然不同的遊戲風格。無論玩家偏好斬殺或射擊，追求勝利的方式都掌握在自己手中！深入研究強大的技能樹和完整的庫存系統，鼓勵玩家持續戰鬥來進行實驗和自訂。我們甚至有一位角色是年輕男孩的靈魂寄生於一件厚重盔甲之中，你有在其他遊戲中見過嗎？
     
展現風格，征服黑暗
受到經典格鬥遊戲和現代動作角色扮演遊戲的啟發，本款遊戲的戰鬥混合了魔法和以武器為基礎的劈斬砍殺。直觀的觸碰螢幕介面提供了不同的選項來規劃戰鬥和滅敵方式。獨特的戰鬥系統可以讓任何玩家輕鬆享受，但也有足夠的深度以滿足期待硬派動作遊戲的 RPG 粉絲。你還在等什麼？舉起神秘的暗黑之劍，投入黑暗之中吧！

美麗的廢墟世界
在全新動畫系統和圖形引擎的基礎下，玩家們將會驚嘆的說：「我不敢相信這不是一款遊戲主機遊戲！」沒錯，遊戲看起來就是這麼棒！歐若拉的哥德幻想世界，針對行動裝置遊戲進行了優化，具有獨特的 cel 陰影效果，可為遊戲世界帶來令人驚嘆的神奇效果和史詩般的戰鬥場景。

隨時隨地遊玩
口袋尺寸的完整 RPG 體驗！隨時隨地享受戰鬥的快感，因為亡者暗影是一款離線單機遊戲。無需上線即可擊殺暗影。

挑戰世界
當擊敗暗影怪物已經無法滿足你時，將遊戲延伸到線上！在競技場中與其他玩家戰鬥，爭奪終極至高無上的地位。

故事：暗黑騎士的旅程
歐若拉曾經是一個繁榮的王國。而古老的黑暗重生，在土地上狂妄地肆虐。農作物腐爛，而生靈塗炭。
受到對於權力和禁忌知識的慾望而驅使，國王拋棄了人民而自我毀滅。人們為失去希望而哭泣。
一位失去記憶但受到決心驅使的孤獨騎士，是人們徹底毀滅之前的最後希望。他迎接宿命，獨自走向低語的暗影。

保持同步，讓遊戲更進一步！在社群平台上與我們的團隊互動，參與最新活動，獲取禮品代碼、稀有護甲套裝、大量水晶以及其他豐富多彩的獎品。
造訪我們：亡者暗影 - 黑暗騎士 -  火柴人格鬥遊戲粉絲頁面：
https://www.facebook.com/ShadowOfDeath.FightingGame/
按讚：群組：https://www.facebook.com/groups/ShadowOfDeath.FightingGame/
關注我們：Twitter: https://twitter.com/Zonmob_Games
加入 IG：https://www.instagram.com/shadow_ofdeath___/

hk.trackCensoredName: 電腦基礎知識：PC 指南
hk.description:
本應用程式包含多種文章和技巧，適合從事電腦技術相關工作或對其感興趣的任何人。

內容分為三個部分：

1. 硬體
2. 電腦組裝
3. 軟體

「硬體」部分提供所有電腦元件、周邊設備及其他裝置的資訊。電腦零組件的基礎理論以簡單易懂的方式進行說明。您可以在此找到關於主機板、中央處理器、記憶體、顯示卡及其他硬體的文章。

硬體主題包括：
• 主機板、中央處理器（CPU）、隨機存取記憶體（RAM）、電源供應器、顯示卡、光碟機、音效卡、散熱系統、電腦機殼  
• 傳統硬碟（HDD）、固態硬碟（SSD）、光碟、USB 隨身碟  
• 鍵盤、滑鼠、網路攝影機、麥克風、圖像掃描器  
• 顯示器、喇叭、耳機、印表機、投影機  
• 網路介面卡、路由器、行動寬頻數據機  
• 遊戲設備、不斷電系統（UPS）、周邊連接器

「電腦組裝」部分提供逐步指南和圖解說明，教您如何自己組裝電腦或更換其零件。詳細的示意圖和圖片有助於理解如何組裝電腦、安裝或升級設備，以及正確安裝各項元件。

電腦組裝主題包括：
• 安裝主機板  
• 安裝中央處理器（CPU）  
• 塗抹與更換散熱膏  
• 安裝顯示卡、記憶體模組、電源供應器、風冷散熱系統、音效卡、SSD 或 HDD

「軟體」部分提供關於電腦作業系統及大多數使用者常用的基礎軟體資訊。

軟體主題包括：
• 作業系統  
• 基礎程式

此應用程式非常適合想提升或複習電腦技術知識的人。

完成本課程後，您將能夠自信地組裝或升級自己的電腦。

應用程式包含超過 50 篇文章，並提供術語與定義的搜尋功能。我們會定期更新電腦基礎知識內容。您也可以回報錯誤或提出改進建議。
hk.trackName: 電腦基礎知識：PC 指南
照片橡皮擦 - 去除水印雜物多余人物
hk.description:
妳還在為照片上不請自來的過客犯愁嗎？
使用照片橡皮擦，有瑕疵的照片瞬間修復，變成完美收藏。
照片橡皮擦可以輕松幫妳去除圖片上的電線、人物、圖標、水印、文字等等雜物，就和拍照壹樣簡單。
照片橡皮擦使用智能算法自動填補受損和缺失的區域，智能填充來到了妳的手機，P圖再也不需要壹臺電腦。
特點：
- 刪除多余的人物
- 擦除照片上的電線
- 擦除臉上的粉刺，黑痣
- 修復有劃痕的舊照片
- 去除照片上意外的移動物體
- 去除照片上的水印、日期等等等等
- 簡單易用

什麽，還有不能完成的其他P圖任務，看看我們的其他軟件，總有壹款能幫到妳：
• 輕松摳圖 - 史上最強摳圖神器.
• 色彩大師 - 改變照片顏色,黑白多彩特效.
• 美圖聚焦 - 虛化背景, 模糊背景, 美化照片, 突出運動健美的妳.
• 奇幻變臉秀 - 制作變臉動畫，照片變視頻，GIF圖片.

給我們壹個評論，幫助我們提高app的功能！

Subscription:
• Payment will be charged to iTunes Account at confirmation of purchase
• Subscription automatically renews unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24-hours before the end of the current period
• Account will be charged for renewal within 24-hours prior to the end of the current period, and identify the cost of the renewal
• Subscriptions may be managed by the user and auto-renewal may be turned off by going to the user's Account Settings after purchase
• Any unused portion of a free trial period, if offered, will be forfeited when the user purchases a subscription to that publication, where applicable
- Privacy Policy: http://ptuwang.com/conf/privacy_notice_cutout.pdf
- Terms of Use: http://ptuwang.com/conf/term_gen.pdf

偶爾/輕度的恐怖或驚嚇題材
hk.description:
歡迎遊玩Balatro官方遊戲！

Balatro是一款混合接龍與撲克等紙牌遊戲的神奇混合體，讓您以前所未見的方式扭曲遊戲規則，令人愛不釋手、滿意無比！
你的目標：打造強力的撲克手牌，擊敗Boss盲注。 
找尋改變遊戲的新小丑，創造精彩絕倫的組合！贏得足量籌碼，擊敗詭譎頭目，在遊戲中尋覓隱藏獎勵出牌和牌組。 
要擊敗大頭目，贏得最終挑戰並贏得遊戲，您需要聚集可以獲得的一切輔助手段。

遊戲特性：

每次遊玩都不一樣：每次抓牌、棄牌和小丑都能極大程度地變化您本次遊玩的進程。
多種遊戲物品：發現超過150種小丑，每種小丑都有特別的能力。將它們與不同牌組相結合，升級牌和禮券提升得分。
多樣遊戲模式：戰役模式與挑戰模式，供您隨心遊玩。
美麗的畫素美術：在CRT風的模糊畫面中沉溺，享受手工繪製、細緻入微的畫素美術：

advisories: 偶爾/輕度的競賽內容
mo.releaseNotes:
Greetings, Property Tycoons!


We have been busy eliminating bugs, enriching features and providing you with investment opportunities!
And we’ve got a new limited-time event running in MONOPOLY!


Log in and check it out today!
mo.description:
Play MONOPOLY on the go without distractions – no ads, no fuss! 

Challenge friends, family and fans from around the globe in the digital version of the official MONOPOLY board game, licensed by Hasbro. 

Head online to play your favourite board game with anyone, anywhere, at any time, or compete against state-of-the-art AI opponents offline. Plus, with the seamless PASS & PLAY mode, you can play the classic MONOPOLY board game with your friends with just one device! 

The classic MONOPOLY board game takes a bold leap into a new format, arriving on mobile with amazing graphics, smooth animations and a catchy soundtrack! 


HOW TO PLAY MONOPOLY

1. Download the official MONOPOLY app
2. Press “PLAY”
3. Pick a mode, board, dice and token
4. Roll the dice and move around the board
5. If you land on a property tile, you can buy it
6. Collect rent when other players land on it
7. Continue around the board, drawing cards when instructed – will you be hit with a surprise tax? Sent to jail? Or get a little bonus money? 
8. If you run out of money, you’ll be bankrupt and out of the game
9. The last player left with a profit wins! 

FEATURES

- MONOPOLY ON THE GO – No connection? No problem. Our roster of AI opponents are ready to challenge you! Or play with your friends offline with Pass & Play! 
- MULTIPLE MODES – Take on AI opponents in Single Player or compete against friends and family in Pass & Play or Online With Friends. Try out Online Multiplayer and face off against fellow tycoons from around the world! 
- EXCLUSIVE BOARDS – Experience the iconic board game like never before with exclusive boards and more! 
- AWESOME NEW TOKENS AND DICE – Whatever your style, MONOPOLY has a set of dice fit for a future tycoon! Pick from nostalgic classic tokens or brand-new designs exclusive to the mobile game.

Get the most authentic MONOPOLY experience with the official MONOPOLY mobile game!

The MONOPOLY name and logo, the distinctive design of the gameboard, the four corner squares, the MR. MONOPOLY name and character, as well as each of the distinctive elements of the board and playing pieces are trademarks of Hasbro for its property trading game and game equipment. © 1935, 2025 Hasbro. All Rights Reserved.

本應用程式包含多種文章和技巧，適合從事電腦技術相關工作或對其感興趣的任何人。

內容分為三個部分：

1. 硬體
2. 電腦組裝
3. 軟體

「硬體」部分提供所有電腦元件、周邊設備及其他裝置的資訊。電腦零組件的基礎理論以簡單易懂的方式進行說明。您可以在此找到關於主機板、中央處理器、記憶體、顯示卡及其他硬體的文章。

硬體主題包括：
• 主機板、中央處理器（CPU）、隨機存取記憶體（RAM）、電源供應器、顯示卡、光碟機、音效卡、散熱系統、電腦機殼  
• 傳統硬碟（HDD）、固態硬碟（SSD）、光碟、USB 隨身碟  
• 鍵盤、滑鼠、網路攝影機、麥克風、圖像掃描器  
• 顯示器、喇叭、耳機、印表機、投影機  
• 網路介面卡、路由器、行動寬頻數據機  
• 遊戲設備、不斷電系統（UPS）、周邊連接器

「電腦組裝」部分提供逐步指南和圖解說明，教您如何自己組裝電腦或更換其零件。詳細的示意圖和圖片有助於理解如何組裝電腦、安裝或升級設備，以及正確安裝各項元件。

電腦組裝主題包括：
• 安裝主機板  
• 安裝中央處理器（CPU）  
• 塗抹與更換散熱膏  
• 安裝顯示卡、記憶體模組、電源供應器、風冷散熱系統、音效卡、SSD 或 HDD

「軟體」部分提供關於電腦作業系統及大多數使用者常用的基礎軟體資訊。

軟體主題包括：
• 作業系統  
• 基礎程式

此應用程式非常適合想提升或複習電腦技術知識的人。

完成本課程後，您將能夠自信地組裝或升級自己的電腦。

應用程式包含超過 50 篇文章，並提供術語與定義的搜尋功能。我們會定期更新電腦基礎知識內容。您也可以回報錯誤或提出改進建議。

mo.description:
【駕考王】澳門駕照筆試備考專用 APP，獨家同步澳門交通事務局最新官方題庫，全覆蓋駕駛理論測驗 5 大模組合計 647 道考題，無廣告、無彈窗，專注助力澳門學員高效備考，一次通過駕駛執照筆試！
同步交通事務局官方最新題庫全量收錄澳門交通事務局駕駛理論測驗完整題庫，涵蓋 5 大核心模組，題庫內容與官方實時同步，確保學員練習的每一題都是考場真題，備考不走彎路：
1.第一冊 A 組交通標誌 176 題
2.第二冊 B 組路面交通情況 66 題
3.第三冊 C 組交通規則 150 題
4.第四冊 D 組違規罰則 139 題
5.第五冊 E 組安全駕駛 116 題
全真模擬考試，還原真實筆試場景1:1 還原澳門交通事務局駕駛理論測驗規則，隨機抽題生成模擬試卷，貼近真實考試場景，提前適應考試節奏，消除考場緊張感，大幅提升考試通過率。
多模式靈活練習，高效補強薄弱點
·背題模式：逐題精講，循序漸進吃透所有考點
·隨機練習：隨機抽題，隨時隨地碎片化鞏固記憶
·分組練習：按 5 大題庫模組分類練習，逐個突破考點
·錯題鞏固：自動收錄練習錯題，針對性強化薄弱環節，避免二次出錯
全車型題庫覆蓋，一站式備考拿證支持傷殘摩托車、摩托車、手動排檔輕型汽車、自動排檔輕型汽車、重型貨車、重型客車 D1 類、重型客車 D2 類、重型牽引車類全車型題庫，無論你考哪種駕照，一個 APP 全部搞定！
更多貼心功能，備考體驗拉滿
·支持 Apple ID 快捷登錄，無需額外註冊，一鍵登錄超便捷
·詳細數據統計，精准定位備考薄弱項，備考效率翻倍
·多種主題風格自由切換，全新 UI 交互界面，操作流暢順手
·完全無廣告、無彈窗干擾，專注備考，學習體驗更舒適
【全設備兼容】支持 iPhone、iPad全設備，系統版本适配完善，隨時隨地都能備考練習。
澳門考駕照，就用駕考王！助你輕鬆通過駕駛理論測驗，順利拿下駕駛執照！

mo.description:
歡迎遊玩Balatro官方遊戲！

Balatro是一款混合接龍與撲克等紙牌遊戲的神奇混合體，讓您以前所未見的方式扭曲遊戲規則，令人愛不釋手、滿意無比！
你的目標：打造強力的撲克手牌，擊敗Boss盲注。 
找尋改變遊戲的新小丑，創造精彩絕倫的組合！贏得足量籌碼，擊敗詭譎頭目，在遊戲中尋覓隱藏獎勵出牌和牌組。 
要擊敗大頭目，贏得最終挑戰並贏得遊戲，您需要聚集可以獲得的一切輔助手段。

遊戲特性：

每次遊玩都不一樣：每次抓牌、棄牌和小丑都能極大程度地變化您本次遊玩的進程。
多種遊戲物品：發現超過150種小丑，每種小丑都有特別的能力。將它們與不同牌組相結合，升級牌和禮券提升得分。
多樣遊戲模式：戰役模式與挑戰模式，供您隨心遊玩。
美麗的畫素美術：在CRT風的模糊畫面中沉溺，享受手工繪製、細緻入微的畫素美術：

advisories: 無限制網路存取
tw.releaseNotes:
新增熱詞功能。
修復了一下已知bug。
tw.description:
Notteka係一款專為高效會議而生嘅AI會議記錄應用，幫你輕鬆錄音、精準轉寫、智能總結，令會議記錄唔再係負擔。

  核心功能：

  【實時錄音轉寫】                                                                                                    
  一鍵錄音，AI實時將語音轉為文字。支援廣東話、普通話、英文、日文四種語言，滿足多語言會議場景。
                                                                                                                      
  【AI智能摘要】                                                    
  會議結束後，AI自動生成結構化會議摘要。多種摘要模版可揀，快速提煉會議重點、待辦事項同決議內容。                      
                                                                                                                      
  【音視頻文件導入】                           
  支援從本地或其它APP導入音頻、視頻文件，自動完成轉寫，令已有嘅錄音都可以快速變成文字記錄。                           
                                                                                                                      
  【AI對話助手】                               
  針對會議內容進行AI對話，快速獲取關鍵信息，追問細節，令會議內容隨時可查可問。                                        
                                                                                                                      
  【便捷管理】                                 
  - 會議記錄按時間自動分組，一目了然                                                                                  
  - 支援搜索、編輯、分享、複製                                      
  - 文件夾分類管理，井井有條                   
                                                                                                                      
  【多語言界面】
  應用界面支援簡體中文、粵語、英文、日文，適配唔同地區用戶。                                                          
                                                                                                                      
  無論係工作會議、課堂講座、訪談記錄定係靈感備忘，Notteka都係你嘅智能會議拍檔。

advisories: 偶而/輕微的卡通或幻想暴力
tw.releaseNotes: Fixed issue with the land not working correctly when built on water.
tw.description:
有沒有想過創造自己的小小奇幻世界？一個農場，某種城堡，或是史詩般的奇幻城市？袖珍建造是一款開放世界遊戲，你可以在無限製或有限制的情況下建造。建造你喜歡的一切，隨時隨地、隨心所欲。盡享無限可能！

一款開放世界沙盒建造遊戲，擁有出色的3D圖形引擎。 - 應用意見

城堡，樹木，圍欄，人類，動物，農場，橋樑，塔，房屋，岩石，土地，所有這些都可以建造。只有想不到，沒有做不到！

- 可建造數百件物品。
- 巨大的開放世界。
- 即刻建造。
- 漂亮的3D圖形。
- 每次更新都添加了新物品。
- 所有物品均已解鎖。
- 無限可能。
- 建築物，樹木，人類，動物，圍欄，道路，城堡，頭骨，桶，農場，橋樑，塔，房屋，岩石，還可加載更多！
- 在世界任何地方建造、旋轉和放置物品。
- 控制相機檢視，旋轉，縮放。
- 3D觸控支持。
- 觸覺反饋。

無限可能！建造自己的城市，建造自己的世界，建造自己的城堡，發揮創造力，創造土地，建造城鎮，創造自己的冒險，在開放世界中的任何地方建造。現在成為袖珍建造者！

us.description:
Notteka is an AI-powered meeting assistant that makes capturing, transcribing, and summarizing meetings effortless. 
  
  Key Features:                                                                                                       
                                                                    
  【Real-Time Transcription】                  
  Tap to record and watch AI convert speech to text in real time. Supports Cantonese, Mandarin, English, and Japanese
  — perfect for multilingual meetings.                                                                                
  
  【AI-Powered Summaries】                                                                                            
  After your meeting, AI generates structured summaries automatically. Choose from multiple templates to extract key
  points, action items, and decisions.         

  【Import Audio & Video】
  Import existing audio or video files from your device or other apps. Notteka transcribes them automatically — turn
  any recording into searchable text.                                                                                 
  
  【AI Chat Assistant】                                                                                               
  Ask questions about your meeting content. Quickly find key information, follow up on details, and interact with your
   notes through natural conversation.         

  【Smart Organization】
  - Meetings automatically grouped by time
  - Search, edit, share, and copy with ease
  - Folder-based organization to keep everything tidy

  【Multilingual Interface】                                                                                          
  App interface available in English, Simplified Chinese, Cantonese, and Japanese.
                                                                                                                      
  Whether it's work meetings, lectures, interviews, or brainstorming sessions — Notteka is your intelligent meeting   
  companion.

The application contains a variety of articles and tips for anyone who works with computer technology or is simply interested in it.

It is divided into three sections:

1. Hardware
2. PC assembly
3. Software

The Hardware section contains information about all computer components, peripherals, and other equipment. The basic theory of computer parts is explained in simple language. Here you will find articles about% the motherboard, central processor, RAM, graphics card, and other hardware.

Hardware topics include:
• Motherboard, central processing unit, random access memory, power supply unit, graphics card, optical disk drive, sound card, cooling systems, computer cases
• Hard disk drives (HDD), solid-state drives (SSD), optical disks, USB flash drives
• Keyboards, mice, webcams, microphones, image scanners
• Monitors, speakers, headphones, printers, projectors
• Network interface controllers, routers, mobile broadband modems
• Gaming devices, uninterruptible power supplies, peripheral connectors

The PC assembly section offers step-by-step guides and illustrated instructions on how to build your own computer or replace its components. Detailed diagrams and pictures will help you understand how to assemble a PC, install or upgrade equipment, and fit components.

PC assembly topics include:
• Motherboard installation
• CPU installation
• Applying and replacing thermal paste
• Installing a graphics card, RAM modules, power supply, air cooling system, sound card, SSD, or HDD

The Software section provides information about computer operating systems and the basic programs that most PC users work with.

Software topics include:
• Operating systems
• Essential programs

This application is ideal for anyone who wants to improve or refresh their knowledge of computer technology.

After completing the course, you will be able to assemble your own computer or upgrade it confidently.

The app contains more than 50 articles and includes a search function for terms and definitions. We regularly update the course on computer fundamentals. You can also report errors or suggest improvements.

Airport ground maneuvering simulation of more than 40 different airports including 
London Heathrow LHR, Philadelphia PHL, Miami Intl. MIA, Singapore, New York JFK, Las Vegas LAS, São Paulo GRU, Montreal YUL, Boston BOS,  and many more. 

Different versions of airports included:
- Play the simplified version, where the airport is scaled down to an easy playable experience.
- Play the real thing. Here the whole airport is in real size displayed, where all your skills are required.

Features
- Give pushback, taxi, holding and take-off clearances. 
- Handle emergencies and try to release all flights on time in order to release the next level.

From an easy single-runway operation at the beginning to demanding hub airports with multiple active runways where all your skills are required.

us.trackName: 聖經(和合本)(繁體中英對照)
us.releaseNotes:
This app has been updated by Apple to display the Apple Watch app icon.

支持新版本iOS. 可下載其他語言聖經(通過設置菜單可直接顯示或隱藏不同版本聖經)。用拼音加註選中中文並可讀出。
us.description:
聖經(和合本)(繁體中英對照)
	Application contains traditional Chinese bible and English bible for reference reading.
	可自由選擇中英對照, 繁體中文或英文聖經閱讀.


請參考在PalReader 網站上的使用錄像來深入了解此應用程序.
閱讀程序具有以下先進功能:

專為iPhone 而做的存儲優化, 存儲相同的圖書比其它程序節省超過30%的空間.
全屏幕閱讀支持. LoudReader 只在用戶需要時顯示控制對話框, 而其它iPhone 閱讀程序顯示控制始終佔用寶貴的屏幕.
支持任意方向閱讀. 程序自動調整圖書顯示方式.
使用HTML顯示圖書的多種字體與圖像, 優於其它程序的單一字體文本顯示方式.
頁內捲動控制幫助讀者在長頁面內快速移動到任意位置.
直觀調整字體大小,顏色以及背景.
手指雙擊擊即可使用的章節選擇, 字體大小控制.
歷史記憶功能幫助用戶快速到任意章節或前後章節
準確回到上次閱讀位置(甚至包括上次卷滾條位置)

操作簡介

每一章為一長頁, 用手指拖動卷滾或輕擊頁面上部1/4或下部1/4進行向上或向下翻頁.
雙擊頁面即可彈出控制面板. 閱讀器的操作由這一個彈出式控制面板控制, 簡單直觀方便易用.
如希望快速在頁面內移動, 可用控制面板小滾輪選擇頁面位置百分比.
輕擊綠色的箭頭控制章節導航的後退和前進.
退出閱讀器時程序會自動記住最後的閱讀位置(甚至包括上次卷滾條位置), 下次進入閱讀器時程序直接打開到此處.
us.trackCensoredName: 聖經(和合本)(繁體中英對照)

tr.releaseNotes:
【本次更新】
- 新增 「我的资源」全新改版，新增TED、YouTube等平台视频播放支持，学习素材更多元
- 新增 「我的资源」支持打开任意网站视频进行播放
- 新增 AI实时字幕生成功能，方便播放外部导入资源
- 新增 测验练习模式支持记录进度
- 优化 文章字号优化统一，减少使用时的割裂感

【近期更新】
- 新增 支持修改译文语言
- 新增 支持切换查词方式
- 新增 查词窗口支持自定义位置

tr.description:
《每日英语 听力学习版》，专为英语学习者打造，精听细读，助你更好学英语。 

【资源丰富，每日更新】 
- 各类考试：初高中、大学四六级、考研、雅思托福、GRE等备考听力材料； 
- 经典教材：走遍美国、赖世雄、新东方等丰富教材； 
- 兴趣学习：有声读物、名人演讲、公开课、少儿英语、影视英语等丰富资源。 

【功能强大，操作简便】 
- 划词搜索：与《欧路词典》无缝集成，长按查词，即指即译； 
- 播放调节：8档语速调节、4种循环模式，单句精听、听写、测验，满足不同阶段的需求； 
- 收藏下载：支持批量下载，离线随时收听； 
- 听力上传：支持听众上传自己的资源，我们为您制作同步高亮字幕； 
- 跟读打分：跟读后可查看单词的发音是否准确，纠正发音问题。 

【特色模块，辅助学习】
- 精听党：名著原声朗读，精编版讲义讲解，配套习题测试。
- 配音秀：提供原声听力材料的配音，秀出你的发音；
- 听力挑战：加入听力训练计划，日积月累提高英语。 

【VIP订阅服务说明】

- 订阅服务：VIP连续包月（1个月）、VIP连续包半年（6个月）、每日外刊连续包月（1个月）
- 订阅价格：以iAP申请信息为准，例如VIP包月服务为18元/月；VIP包半年服务为68元/6个月；每日外刊服务为63元/月
- 付款：用户确认购买并付款后计入iTunes账户
- 苹果iTunes账户会在到期前24小时内扣费，扣费成功后订阅周期顺延一个订阅周期
- 如需取消订阅，请手动打开苹果手机“设置”-->进入“iTunes Store与App Store”-->点击“Apple ID”，选择“查看Apple ID”，进入“账户设置”页面，点击“订阅”，选择听力VIP取消订阅即可。如未在订阅期结束的至少24小时前关闭订阅，此订阅将自动续订。
- 自动续费规则：https://www.eudic.net/v4/en/home/service
- 隐私协议：https://www.eudic.net/v4/home/privacy

tr.releaseNotes: Prepare yourself for the storm in this scorching new intermediate map: Sandstorm. Each round brings a shifting path designed to confuse your monkeys. With a large oasis for Subs and Buccaneers near the entrance and a curving path that flows through the terrain, you'll find plenty of areas for your monkeys to shine.
tr.description:
Five-star tower defense with unrivaled depth and replayability. Now with rewarded leaderboards for even more fun and challenge!

The Bloons are back and this time they mean business! Build awesome towers, choose your favorite upgrades, hire cool new Special Agents, and pop every last invading Bloon!

Featuring 2 brand new Towers, cool Special Agents, glorious retina graphics, original Tracks and Special Missions, a whole new tier of Specialty Building upgrades, and the powerful Monkey Lab to further upgrade your towers, Bloons TD 5 delivers hours and hours of fun, challenging play to fans and new players alike.

Hours and Hours of Awesome Gameplay:
* 90+ Tracks
* 21 powerful towers with Activated Abilities and 2 upgrade paths
* 10 Special Agents
* Online Co-op play
* Multi-track Odyssey Challenges
* Boss Bloon Special Events
* 10 Special Missions
* 250+ Random Missions
* Daily Challenges
* New Bloon enemies - tougher Camos, Regrow Bloons, and the fearsome ZOMG
* 50+ Game Center Achievements and Challenges
* iCloud Support
* 3 different game modes
* Freeplay mode after mastering a track
* 4 difficulty settings and family-friendly theme so anyone can play

And that's just the beginning - regular planned updates will keep Bloons TD 5 fresh, fun, and challenging for many months to come. Now it's time to pop some Bloons!

Remember to save to iCloud after each victory or purchase to save your progress. 

iPad version also available - check out Bloons TD 5 HD for full screen UI awesomeness!

https://ninjakiwi.com/terms

The application contains a variety of articles and tips for anyone who works with computer technology or is simply interested in it.

It is divided into three sections:

1. Hardware
2. PC assembly
3. Software

The Hardware section contains information about all computer components, peripherals, and other equipment. The basic theory of computer parts is explained in simple language. Here you will find articles about% the motherboard, central processor, RAM, graphics card, and other hardware.

Hardware topics include:
• Motherboard, central processing unit, random access memory, power supply unit, graphics card, optical disk drive, sound card, cooling systems, computer cases
• Hard disk drives (HDD), solid-state drives (SSD), optical disks, USB flash drives
• Keyboards, mice, webcams, microphones, image scanners
• Monitors, speakers, headphones, printers, projectors
• Network interface controllers, routers, mobile broadband modems
• Gaming devices, uninterruptible power supplies, peripheral connectors

The PC assembly section offers step-by-step guides and illustrated instructions on how to build your own computer or replace its components. Detailed diagrams and pictures will help you understand how to assemble a PC, install or upgrade equipment, and fit components.

PC assembly topics include:
• Motherboard installation
• CPU installation
• Applying and replacing thermal paste
• Installing a graphics card, RAM modules, power supply, air cooling system, sound card, SSD, or HDD

The Software section provides information about computer operating systems and the basic programs that most PC users work with.

Software topics include:
• Operating systems
• Essential programs

This application is ideal for anyone who wants to improve or refresh their knowledge of computer technology.

After completing the course, you will be able to assemble your own computer or upgrade it confidently.

The app contains more than 50 articles and includes a search function for terms and definitions. We regularly update the course on computer fundamentals. You can also report errors or suggest improvements.

advisories: Infrequent/Mild Simulated Gambling

Infrequent/Mild Horror/Fear Themes
tr.description:
Welcome to the official Balatro mobile game!

Hypnotic and endlessly satisfying, Balatro is a magical mix of card games like Solitaire and Poker, that lets you twist the rules in ways never seen before!

Your goal is to beat the Boss Blinds by making strong poker hands.

Find new Jokers that change the game and create awesome and exciting combos! Win enough chips to beat tricky bosses, and find hidden bonus hands and decks as you play. You’ll need all the help you can get to beat the big boss, win the final challenge, and win the game.

Features:

* Remastered controls for touch screen devices.
* Each run is different: every pick-up, discard and joker can dramatically alter the course of your run.
* Multiple game items: discover over 150 Jokers, each with special powers. Use them with different decks,upgrade cards and vouchers to boost your scores.
* Different Game modes: Campaign mode and challenge mode for you to play.
* Beautiful Pixel Art: Immerse yourself in the CRT fuzz and enjoy detailed, hand-crafted pixel art.

pt.trackName: Notteka ｜ 专业粤语会议助手
pt.releaseNotes:
新增热词功能。
修复了一下已知bug。
pt.description:
Notteka 是一款专为高效会议而生的AI会议记录应用，帮助你轻松录音、精准转写、智能总结，让会议记录不再是负担。 
  
  核心功能：                                                                                                          
                                                                    
  【实时录音转写】                                                                                                    
  一键录音，AI实时将语音转为文字。支持普通话、粤语、英语、日语四种语言，满足多语言会议场景。
                                                                                                                      
  【AI智能摘要】                                                                                                      
  会议结束后，AI自动生成结构化会议摘要。多种摘要模版可选，快速提炼会议重点、待办事项和决议内容。                      
                                                                                                                      
  【音视频文件导入】                                                
  支持从本地或其它APP导入音频、视频文件，自动完成转写，让已有的录音也能快速变成文字记录。                             
                                                                                                                      
  【AI对话助手】                               
  针对会议内容进行AI对话，快速获取关键信息，追问细节，让会议内容随时可查可问。                                        
                                                                                                                      
  【便捷管理】                                 
  - 会议记录按时间自动分组，一目了然                                                                                  
  - 支持搜索、编辑、分享、复制                                                                                        
  - 文件夹分类管理，井井有条                   
                                                                                                                      
  【多语言界面】                                                                                                      
  应用界面支持简体中文、粤语、英语、日语，适配不同地区用户。                                                          
                                                                                                                      
  无论是工作会议、课堂讲座、访谈记录还是灵感备忘，Notteka都是你的智能会议伙伴。
pt.trackCensoredName: Notteka ｜ 专业粤语会议助手

pt.description:
O aplicativo contém uma variedade de artigos e dicas para qualquer pessoa que trabalhe com tecnologia de computadores ou que simplesmente tenha interesse no assunto.

Ele é dividido em três seções:

1. Hardware
2. Montagem de PC
3. Software

A seção de Hardware contém informações sobre todos os componentes do computador, periféricos e outros equipamentos. A teoria básica sobre as partes do computador é explicada em linguagem simples. Aqui você encontrará artigos sobre a placa-mãe, processador central, memória RAM, placa de vídeo e outros componentes.

Tópicos de Hardware incluem:
• Placa-mãe, unidade central de processamento (CPU), memória de acesso aleatório (RAM), fonte de alimentação, placa de vídeo, unidade de disco óptico, placa de som, sistemas de refrigeração, gabinetes de computador
• Discos rígidos (HDD), unidades de estado sólido (SSD), discos ópticos, pen drives USB
• Teclados, mouses, webcams, microfones, scanners de imagem
• Monitores, alto-falantes, fones de ouvido, impressoras, projetores
• Placas de interface de rede, roteadores, modems de banda larga móvel
• Dispositivos de jogos, no-breaks (UPS), conectores para periféricos

A seção de Montagem de PC oferece guias passo a passo e instruções ilustradas sobre como montar seu próprio computador ou substituir componentes. Diagramas e imagens detalhadas ajudarão você a entender como montar um PC, instalar ou atualizar equipamentos e encaixar componentes.

Tópicos de Montagem de PC incluem:
• Instalação da placa-mãe
• Instalação da CPU
• Aplicar e substituir pasta térmica
• Instalação da placa de vídeo, módulos de RAM, fonte de alimentação, sistema de refrigeração a ar, placa de som, SSD ou HDD

A seção de Software fornece informações sobre sistemas operacionais de computadores e programas básicos usados pela maioria dos usuários de PC.

Tópicos de Software incluem:
• Sistemas operacionais
• Programas essenciais

Este aplicativo é ideal para qualquer pessoa que queira melhorar ou atualizar seus conhecimentos em tecnologia de computadores.

Após concluir o curso, você será capaz de montar ou atualizar seu próprio computador com confiança.

O aplicativo contém mais de 50 artigos e inclui uma função de pesquisa por termos e definições. Atualizamos regularmente o curso de fundamentos de informática. Você também pode relatar erros ou sugerir melhorias.

advisories: Uso pouco frequente/moderado de violência fantástica ou em desenhos animados
pt.description:
Prepare-se para entrar em ação e mostrar ao Reino quem é o verdadeiro chefe no melhor jogo de defesa de torres!

Enfrente impérios de poderosos inimigos. Ataque os chefes supremos, desbloqueando e mudando para novas torres. Treine heróis lendários e conquiste usando sua estratégia neste incrível jogo tower defense.

O Kingdom Rush Vengeance lhe dará horas e horas de partidas do melhor jogo de defesa de torres disponível! E o melhor, jogos sem net, jogue mesmo sem internet!

Heróis, seu Exército, Inimigos e lendárias tower defense lutas de chefe!
- 17 Poderosos HERÓIS que acatam as suas ordens sem hesitar
- Evolua seus heróis e melhore suas habilidades
- 10+ PEÇAS E ARTEFATOS para aquela ação extra na batalha na defesa de torres.
- NOVOS PODERES E ARMADURAS para vencer seus inimigos, estilo defesa de torres!
- 30 UPGRADES para treinar seu exército da sua maneira.
- 60+ INIMIGOS MORTAIS que colocarão à prova toda a sua inteligência e habilidades estratégicas
- CORRA PARA SALVAR O REINO ao combater 6 poderosos chefes nas batalhas contra chefe mais lendárias!

Seleção Épica de Torres e Upgrades
- 22 NOVAS TORRES para defender seu reino
- HABILIDADES ÚNICAS E PODERES ESPECIAIS para cada torre
- Escolha seu arsenal de torres e execute sua estratégia. 

Crie combinações devastadoras de torres, habilidades e poderes especiais para deter seus inimigos!

Jogo de Defesa de Torres Quase Sem Fim

- 42 ETAPAS DE DESAFIO que testarão suas habilidades
- 9 REINOS DIFERENTES para conquistar e explorar no estilo tower defense
- 60+ CONQUISTAS, segredos escondidos e coisas divertidas para você brincar e descobrir enquanto explora o reino!
- DESAFIOS HERÓICOS E DE FERRO em todas as fases
- CASUAL, NORMAL, VETERANO OU IMPOSSÍVEL dificuldade para todos os níveis
- Convocar ondas inimigas mais rapidamente para ganhar ouro extra

Jogos Sem Net Incríveis de Defesa de Torre

Sem Wi-Fi em sua Dark Tower?

- JOGOS SEM NET - jogue offline, quando não tiver wifi
- JOGO OFFLINE - acesse mesmo sem conexão à internet
- Você pode escolher jogar o Kingdom Rush Vengeance como seu jogo Tower Defence offline. 

--------------------------------------------------

Confira aqui as últimas notícias do Lorde Vez'nan:
https://www.kingdomrushvengeance.com/

Termos e Condições:
https://www.ironhidegames.com/TermsOfService

Política de Privacidade:
https://www.ironhidegames.com/PrivacyPolicy

Criadores de vídeo, criadores de podcast e streamers:
Adoraríamos ver seu conteúdo no Youtube e no Twitch! Nós apoiamos e promovemos os criadores de canais, portanto, se você quiser que mostremos seus vídeos ou quiser saber mais sobre nossos jogos, sinta-se à vontade para entrar em contato, é só enviar um email para contact@ironhidegames.com

pt.description:
Damos-te a boas-vindas ao jogo oficial do Balatro!

Altamente viciante e satisfatório, Balatro consiste numa combinação mágica de jogos de cartas como Solitário e Póquer e dá-te a possibilidade de quebrares as regras de uma forma nunca antes vista!
O teu objetivo é ultrapassares as Boss Blinds conseguindo mãos fortes de póquer. 
Encontra novos Jokers que mudam o jogo e criam incríveis e entusiasmantes combinações! Ganha fichas suficientes para ultrapassares os astutos bosses e encontra baralhos e mãos de bónus ocultos enquanto jogas. 
Serve-te de todo o tipo de ajudas para derrotares o boss principal, ultrapassares o desafio final e venceres o jogo.

Características:

Cada sessão é diferente: cada item recolhido, cada carta descartada e cada joker podem mudar drasticamente o rumo do jogo.
Vários itens de jogo: descobre mais de 150 Jokers, cada um com poderes especiais. Usa-os com baralhos diferentes, mehora cartas e vouchers para conseguires pontuações melhores.
Diferentes modos de jogo: Desfruta do modo de campanha e do modo de desafio.
Espetacular arte pixelizada: Regressa à era dos CRTs e desfruta de uma arte pixelizada rica em detalhes e criada de forma manual.

advisories: Uso pouco frequente/moderado de violência fantástica ou em desenhos animados
Uso pouco frequente/moderado de temas de terror/medo
pt.releaseNotes:
Estamos à beira da extinção. A humanidade esqueceu como amar - não há crianças, as pessoas deslizam para a esquerda na felicidade e passam as noites jantando sozinhas. Mas o Verme Neurax pode sentir o amor esta noite e vai mostrar a todos quão contagioso o amor realmente é!


Pode o supremo Bichinho do Abraço reacender a chama?
pt.description:
Você consegue contaminar o mundo? Plague Inc. é uma mistura única de alta estratégia e simulação terrivelmente realista. 

Seu agente patogênico acabou de contaminar o 'Paciente zero'. Agora você deve acabar com a história da humanidade evoluindo para uma mortal Praga global, enquanto se adapta a tudo que a humanidade pode fazer para se defender. 

Brilhantemente executado, com jogabilidade inovadora e construido especificamente para iPhone e iPad, Plague Inc. é uma evolução do gênero de estratégia e leva os jogos em dispositivos móves (e você) a novos níveis. É Você contra o mundo - só o forte sobrevive! 

◈◈◈ Jogo #1 globalmente com mais de 500 milhões de jogos jogados ◈◈◈

Plague Inc. é um hit global com mais de meio milhão de classificações de 5 estrelas e reportagens em jornais como The Economist, New York Post, Boston Herald, The Guardian e London Metro! 

O desenvolvedor de Plague Inc. foi convidado a falar no CDC em Atlanta sobre os modelos de doenças do jogo!

▶ “O jogo cria um mundo convincente que engaja o público em tópicos sérios de saúde pública” – The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
▶ “Melhor jogo para tablet de 2012” - New York Daily News 
▶ “Plague Inc. vai captar sua atenção de todas as formas certas, e vai mantê-la” - Touch Arcade 
▶ “Não há como negar o alto nível de qualidade de Plague Inc.” - Modojo 
▶ “Plague Inc. não deveria ser tão divertido como é” – London Metro 
▶ “Vai deixar você na esperança de destruir o mundo, tudo em nome de um pouco de diversão” – Pocket Lint 
▶ “A jogabilidade de Plague Inc.'s é contagiosa” - Slide to Play 
▶ Vencedor – “Melhor jogo do ano” – Pocket Gamer
▶ “Matar bilhões nunca foi tão divertido” – IGN 

◈◈◈

Características: 
● Lindos gráficos retina com uma interface bastante refinada (Contágio garantido) 
● Mundo hiperrealistas, altamente detalhado, com IA avançada (Gerenciamento de epidemia) 
● Sistema abrangente de ajudar e tutorial (Eu sou a lenda da ajuda) 
● 12 diferentes tipos de doenças com estratégias radicalmente diferentes para dominar (12 Macacos?) 
● Funcionalidade completa de Salvamento/Carregamento (28 salvamentos depois!) 
● 50+ países para contaminar, centenas de caractetísticas para evoluir e milhares de eventos mundiais para se adaptar (Evolução pandêmica) 
● Suporte total ao jogo 
● Atualizações de expansão acrescentam o Verme Neurax que controla a mente, o Vírus Necroa que produz zumbis, Corridas de velocidade e Cenários da vida real!
● Você consegue salvar o mundo? Assuma o controle e vença uma doença mundial na nossa maior expansão!
● Enfrente as Doenças Diárias, ganhe melhorias poderosas e compita contra o mundo no Modo Surto!


Traduzido para Inglês, Alemão, Espanhol, Português do Brasil, Italiano, Francês, Japonês, Coreano e Russo. (mais em breve) 

P.S. Dê um tapa nas suas costas se entendeu todos as referências da literatura do tema! 

Preço promocional especial para celebrar o fato de ser o 5º jogo de iPhone mais popular de 2015!

◈◈◈

Curta Plague Inc. no Facebook: 
http://www.facebook.com/PlagueInc 

Siga-me no Twitter: 
www.twitter.com/NdemicCreations
